properties.body:
[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 025/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC
APPROACHES TO PORT KLAIPEDA – ENTRANCE – MAINTENANCE DREDGING
MAINTENANCE DREDGING IN PROGRESS IN SEAWAY CHANNEL, WITHIN AREA
BOUNDED BY:
55-43.79N 021-04.39E
55-43.77N 021-04.50E
55-43.72N 021-04.48E
55-43.74N 021-04.36E.
MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION IN THE AREA AND
CONTACT VTS FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.
